_comment: Lighthouse CI config for brief §6 #8: mobile ≥90 Performance, 100 Accessibility, 100 Best Practices. Run on a PRODUCTION build (next build && next start), not dev — Turbopack dev is not representative. Locally/CI: `npx @lhci/cli autorun`. Not runnable in this sandboxed env (no Chrome + no install perms); config is the deliverable so the threshold is enforceable wherever Lighthouse can run.
